today.name: CREOSOTE
today.nextAction: v0.4.17 — TWO SIZES ONLY + FALCON G/R (user feedback): (1) the 32px utility size is retired — SUMMING PREGAIN/WIDTH/BALANCE are full STD cells (148x44) on their own row above the VU deck; LIMITER widened to 314 and its 4 controls are a 2x2 STD grid; AUTO LEVEL pill replaced by a STD lens toggle tile (green lamp when engaged). Console-wide there are now exactly TWO button sizes: HERO and STD. (2) COMPRESS G/R meter restyled Millennium-Falcon: worn cool charcoal housing with corner grime + scratch streaks, segments are aged unevenly-bright lenses on a COOLER ramp (ice -> mint -> teal, amber only at the heavy end; smoked dead lenses). VERIFY IN ABLETON: no control anywhere except HERO/STD tiles + power/tab chrome; LIMITER 2x2 reads well; SUMMING tiles match module tiles exactly; G/R meter reads aged + cool with uneven bulbs. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork. Remaining UI punch-list unchanged.
today.firstAction: Confirm v18.8.6 source/artifact is committed as the active CREOSOTE baseline.
